summary: Implemented VA-side mentor escalation handler with precedent-based guidance system, confidence assessment, and human escalation bridge integration point for D3.x
learnings: Fuzzy precedent matching using difflib.SequenceMatcher works well for situation pattern recognition
Confidence assessment combining precedent strength, context factors, and risk levels provides good escalation decisions
Human escalation trigger (<0.5 confidence) with packaged context creates clean handoff to D3.x stream
Precedent storage as reusable patterns builds institutional knowledge over time
Audit trail with correlation IDs enables cross-system verification with zoputer instances

integration_points.zoputer_escalation: Receives requests from D2.2 mentor-escalation skill
integration_points.human_escalation_bridge: Packages context for D3.x when needs_human=true
integration_points.audit_system: Logs all escalations with correlation IDs
integration_points.precedent_learning: Builds reusable guidance patterns over time

verification_completed: CLI help and commands work correctly
Precedent matching finds similar situations (60% threshold)
Confidence assessment triggers human escalation appropriately
Precedent storage and retrieval functions properly
decision_types_handled: client tier considerations (enterprise gets more autonomy)
